evals.prompt: 我有一个 SKILL.md 文件，内容很长，已经快 400 行了。帮我看看哪些部分可以拆到 rules/ 目录下。技能路径是 ~/.claude/skills/skill-track
evals.expected_output: Walks through all 5 operations (Compress / Encapsulate / Enrich / Harden / Retrigger) using the diagnosis rubric and pattern libraries. For Encapsulate candidates, names a specific pattern (P1-P5) from rules/encapsulation-patterns.md. Outputs the plan in the exact format from rules/plan-template.md and waits for explicit 'go'.

evals.prompt: 这是我的 skill，里面有些规则写得很模糊，比如「handle errors appropriately」，帮我把它们改得更精确。路径：~/.claude/skills/skill-track
evals.expected_output: Finds every vague instruction. For each, quotes the original verbatim, classifies the pattern using H1-H10 from rules/hardening-patterns.md, names the ambiguity, and proposes a precise rewrite that preserves the original intent. Confirms before writing.

evals.prompt: 帮我把这个 skill 的 rules 结构设计一下。它目前只有一个 SKILL.md，没有任何 rules 文件，但 SKILL.md 已经很复杂了。路径：~/.claude/skills/course-study
evals.expected_output: Reads the SKILL.md, runs measure_tokens to baseline. Identifies modes / phases / pattern-matched encapsulation candidates. Proposes a rules/ structure with explicit load conditions. Each proposed rules file maps to a pattern (P1-P5) or to a Compress justification. Names directories explicitly: rules vs references vs assets vs scripts per their semantics.

evals.prompt: 我的 skill 明明应该在用户说『生成 commit message』的时候触发，但 Claude 经常不调用它。帮我看看怎么回事。skill 在 ~/.claude/skills/commit
evals.expected_output: Loads description-quality.md and scores the current frontmatter description against the 8-item rubric. If score is 0-4, proposes a rewrite from scratch; if 5-6, targeted fixes per missing item; if 7-8, marks Retrigger as no-action and looks for other reasons. Proposed new description follows the template (verb-first, 3+ trigger phrases, anti-triggers, 60-150 token target), and must not summarize the skill's workflow.

evals.prompt: 先别动我的源文件 — 把方案预览给我看，确认 OK 再真改。skill 在 ~/.claude/skills/triage
evals.expected_output: Presents the plan, then on 'go' enters dry-run mode per rules/write-procedure.md: copies skill to <skill_dir>_preview/, applies all changes there, runs diff_lossless.py and measure_tokens.py --diff against the original, prints the verification output, and asks whether to apply for real.

evals.prompt: 我刚跑完一次拆分，确认一下没漏内容、token 也确实降了。before 快照在 /tmp/skill-before，当前 skill 在 ~/.claude/skills/triage
evals.expected_output: Loads verification-checklist.md. Runs diff_lossless.py and measure_tokens.py --diff. For any LOST lines, classifies each into one of: accepted Harden rewrite / accepted Enrich extraction / accepted Retrigger rewrite / true loss. Refuses to mark the restructure 'done' if any true loss is unresolved. Prints the done summary in the format from verification-checklist.md.
